name: rtl_433 Radio Bridge
description: Shared rtl_433 radio bridge for receiving sub-GHz sensor packets through PiPhi Core.

schema.title: Radio Bridge Setup
schema.description: Choose how PiPhi should listen for sub-GHz sensors. The defaults work for most 433 MHz sensors.

radio_band.title: Radio band
radio_band.description: Choose the band your sensors use. If you are not sure, start with 433.92 MHz.

custom_frequency.title: Custom frequency
custom_frequency.description: Only needed when Radio band is Custom. Use rtl_433 format such as 344.975M.

rtl_sdr_device.title: USB receiver
rtl_sdr_device.description: Leave as auto unless you have more than one SDR receiver plugged in.

receiver_gain.title: Signal sensitivity
receiver_gain.description: Leave as auto for normal use. Increase only if reception is weak or unreliable.

rtl433_protocols.title: Device type filter
rtl433_protocols.description: Optional. Leave blank to let rtl_433 identify supported devices automatically. Advanced users may enter comma-separated rtl_433 protocol IDs.

mqtt_enabled.title: Share packets with MQTT
mqtt_enabled.description: Optional. Enable this only if another app should also receive decoded radio packets.

rtl433_command.title: Advanced command override
rtl433_command.description: Optional developer setting. If set, PiPhi uses this raw rtl_433 command and ignores the friendly radio options above.
